heading: Network Peering Connection
body:
Atlas supports peering connections with other AWS (Amazon Web Services), Azure (Microsoft Azure), or
Google Cloud network peering connections. To learn more, see
Set Up a Network Peering Connection.

> **Important:** If this is the first `M10+` dedicated paid cluster for the
> selected region or regions *and* you plan on creating one or more
> VPC peering connections, please review the documentation
> on VPC peering connections before continuing.
